name: elder_ts_v2_sweep_v2
description: Elder Triple Screen v2 — hypothesis-driven deep sweep. v1 failed (486 combos, best PF=0.778) because ATR stop was effectively tied to the noisy entry timeframe while the strategy trades a 4H trend. This v2 sweep fixes that mismatch by forcing risk ATR to 1H and then comparing 15m vs 60m entry timing. Also: use StochRSI only (RSI was always worse in v1), use EMA21 (more stable in crypto than EMA13), test oscillator pullback depth properly.
_key_hypothesis: 1H risk ATR will prevent the old micro-stop problem; once that is fixed, entry_tf=60 may still beat 15 by filtering noise, but the comparison will now be honest.
_expected_outcome: best runs: risk_tf=60, entry_tf=60 or 15 depending on whether cleaner timing or faster entries dominate; likely sl_atr_mult=2.5-4.0, tp_atr_mult=9.0-15.0, osc_ob=67-72, osc_os=28-33
_after_sweep: if confirmed: zoom sweep around winning entry_tf with finer grid on sl/tp/trail and consider promoting ETS2 as a trend-only sleeve
